# trader — Pitfalls

<a id="cmp-2026-03-05-001"></a>
### cmp-2026-03-05-001
---
record_id: cmp-2026-03-05-001
type: competence
summary: "Avoid treating momentum breakouts as a default play during high-volatility opens."
evidence:
  - "intake/pending/2026-03-05.md#claim-20260305-002"

For this role, early momentum entries after fakeouts in volatile markets should be treated as a recurring pitfall rather than a standard setup.
